title: SB 1346 Allows Santa Clara, San Mateo & San Francisco Counties to Create A Regional Free Pharmacy To Help Those In Need

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Nearly 1 in 4 Americans skip doses or don’t get prescriptions filled because they can’t afford to.",
    "The annual financial cost of discarded medications in skilled nursing facilities is estimated to be $2 billion, $100 million of which is in California.",
    "From August 2015 to January 2022, the Better Health Pharmacy dispensed 152,039 prescriptions to patients, saving the county an estimated $8.5 million.",
    "Better Health Pharmacy is California’s first and only surplus drug redistribution pharmacy.",
    "There is huge potential — and huge need — for more work to connect thousands of patients in need with surplus medication that is going to waste each year."
  ]
}
```
